$schema: LSTs not (yet) in the sanctum-lst-list registry. The pipeline includes these and sources exchange rate from Jupiter + TVL from on-chain token supply (extra-api doesn't cover them). Provide mint, symbol, name, decimals. Optional: program + validatorList to enable the decentralization RPC read. The pipeline never writes here.

lsts.name: Raiku Staked SOL
lsts.notes: First Solana LST with blockspace auction revenue as a yield source (Raiku, launched 2026-06-03, with Sanctum/Kamino/Loopscale/Jupiter). Not yet in sanctum-lst-list; rate via Jupiter, TVL via on-chain supply.
